overall.description: A continuous drive across the Golden Gate Bridge (Gant Bridge) in GTA V, starting on the bridge deck, passing through the south tower with a dramatic upward tilt, and continuing toward the Marin headlands. The footage shows clear sunny weather with the iconic red-orange bridge structure against a blue sky.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the bridge deck toward the suspension tower

entered.detail: black metal lattice safety railing along the left side of the bridge deck
red metal safety railing along the right side of the bridge
thick red vertical suspension cables supporting the bridge deck
gray asphalt road surface with yellow lane markings
distant blue ocean visible beyond the bridge railing

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a vehicle driving along an empty suspension bridge deck on a clear day. The black lattice railing lines the left side while a red railing is on the right, with red suspension cables rising in the distance and the ocean visible on the left horizon.

events.description: camera tilts upward dramatically to view the tower structure from below while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: driving through the tower arch while looking up at the massive red steel structure overhead

entered.detail: massive red-orange steel tower with vertical beams and cross-bracing
large rectangular opening at the base of the tower framing the sky beyond

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and passes through the massive bridge tower. The camera tilts upward to reveal the tower's intricate steel structure against the blue sky, with suspension cables now visible on both sides at close range.

scene_state.functional_zone: open bridge span with suspension cables

events.description: exits the tower shadow back into open sunlight on the main span

agents.ego_description: driving across the open span with suspension cables lining both sides of the deck

entered.detail: red curved street light poles lining both sides of the bridge deck
the opposite suspension tower visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the tower, the vehicle continues across the open span. Red street lights line both sides of the road, and the distant tower is visible ahead while suspension cables create vertical lines against the bright sky.

events.description: forested hills and rocky cliffs become visible on the right side as the bridge approaches land

agents.ego_description: driving toward the shoreline with forested hills and rocky terrain visible on the right

entered.detail: green forested hills rising up from the water's edge
exposed rocky cliff with patches of vegetation on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle approaching the far shore of the bridge. The right side reveals a rocky cliff face and forested hills, while the bridge continues forward with its red railings and suspension cables still visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive across a massive suspension bridge that transitions from an open ocean crossing to a rugged coastal arrival. It begins with a vehicle moving along an empty deck flanked by black and red railings, with the ocean stretching toward the horizon under a clear sky. As the vehicle approaches the massive bridge tower, the camera tilts upward to reveal the intricate red steel structure and suspension cables towering against the blue expanse. The scene then opens back onto the road as the vehicle passes through the tower, moving along a span lined with red street lights and vertical cables. Finally, the perspective shifts toward the far shore, where the bridge structure gives way to a rocky cliff face and forested hills.
